# Transcrição: 12. AFFORDABILITY CLOSE - WE WILL WORK IT OUT TO WHERE IT IS AFFORDABLE

- **Fonte:** 12. AFFORDABILITY CLOSE - WE WILL WORK IT OUT TO WHERE IT IS AFFORDABLE
- **Duração:** 00:16
- **Idioma:** en

---

## [00:00 - 00:16]

You just heard, I don't think I can afford it. I don't think we can make sense of it, something like that. Look, this investment only looks like you can't afford it. I promise you that we will work it out so that you can own what you want, own your dreams, and that they're affordable.
